content: Add PostgreSQL dependencies (SQLAlchemy 2.x, asyncpg, alembic, psycopg2-binary)
Set up DATABASE_URL environment variable with URL-encoded password
Create SQLAlchemy models for all entities (Portfolio, Asset, ScenarioSeries, AnalysisRun, ScenarioResult)
Set up Alembic and create initial migration
Test PostgreSQL connection and create tables
Create pg_poc.py script to validate schema and basic CRUD operations
Migrate API endpoints to use repositories instead of Beanie ODM
Create data migration script to transfer existing data from MongoDB to PostgreSQL
Run data migration and verify all data transferred correctly
Run end-to-end tests to ensure all functionality works with PostgreSQL
